name: @loomfsm/dashboard
description: loom's web control plane — a React SPA over the @loomfsm/server HTTP API. A PEER client of the same resolver the CLI drives: edit config/secrets/models, browse projects, submit tasks, answer gates. Ships as PREBUILT static assets the server serves at / — it adds no runtime dependency to the server.

scripts.test: tsc --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && node --test dist-test/test/*.test.js && vite build
